name: io.github.bighippoman/intercept-mcp
title: Intercept
description: Give your AI the ability to read the web. Fetches URLs as clean markdown with multi-tier fallback.

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Brave Search API key for the search tool. Not needed for the fetch tool.

environmentVariables.name: SEARXNG_URL
environmentVariables.description: Self-hosted SearXNG instance URL for the search tool.

environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: GitHub token to raise API rate limits for the GitHub issue/PR/release handler.
